before: public void Create(Product p){ if(p==null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(p)); if(string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.Name)) throw new ArgumentException("Name required"); _repo.Add(p); } public void Update(Product p){ if(p==null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(p)); if(string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.Name)) throw new ArgumentException("Name required"); _repo.Update(p); }
after: private static void ValidateProduct(Product p){ if (p == null) throw new ArgumentNullException(nameof(p)); if (string.IsNullOrEmpty(p.Name)) throw new ArgumentException("Name required"); } public void Create(Product p){ ValidateProduct(p); _repo.Add(p); } public void Update(Product p){ ValidateProduct(p); _repo.Update(p); }
why_safe: Validation logic extracted into shared private helper; repository calls unchanged.

before: public UserDto GetUser(int id){ var u = _db.Users.Find(id); return new UserDto { Id=u.Id, Name=u.Name, Email=u.Email }; } public UserDto GetAdmin(int id){ var u = _db.Admins.Find(id); return new UserDto { Id=u.Id, Name=u.Name, Email=u.Email }; }
after: private static UserDto MapToDto(User u) => new UserDto { Id = u.Id, Name = u.Name, Email = u.Email }; public UserDto GetUser(int id) => MapToDto(_db.Users.Find(id)); public UserDto GetAdmin(int id) => MapToDto(_db.Admins.Find(id));
